name: The HP-Compaq Merger: If There's the Will, There's a Way
description: Aberdeen InSight by Peter Kastner analyzing the proposed HP-Compaq merger announced September 2001. Identifies significant product overlap across servers (Intel/Windows, Unix, Itanium, Linux) and services, and warns that customers are confused and concerned about a merger focused on 'more' rather than 'better.' Argues that sustained outward customer focus — via strong marketing and sales retraining — is the key to merger success, and that without it Dell, IBM, and Sun would be the beneficiaries. This is an independent source file (Archive-2) for the same insight as 2001-hp-compaq-kastner-insight1-d6dc38 from Archive-1; processed separately as instructed.
